creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text: How-To-Repeat: 1: try to use rpc.php 2: watch error log and see it throws a missing depedency error as below... [Fri Jul 08 12:22:28 2011] [error] [client 192.168.15.128] PHP Warning: include_once() [function.include]: Failed opening 'HTTP/WebDAV/Server.php' for inclusion (include_path='/usr/local/www/horde/lib:.:/usr/local/share/pear') in /usr/local/www/horde/lib/Horde/RPC/webdav.php on line 9 [Fri Jul 08 12:22:28 2011] [error] [client 192.168.15.128] PHP Fatal error: Class 'HTTP_WebDAV_Server' not found in /usr/local/www/horde/lib/Horde/RPC/webdav.php on line 81 3: Apply patch and enjoy...
